episodes.title: THE MANSON MASSACRE a.k.a. THE CULT (1971) Rare exploitation Feature Film with English subtitles.
episodes.description:
The Manson Massacre is a 1972 exploitation horror film directed by Kentucky Jones and starring MaKee K. Blaisdell and Debbie Osborne. It is based on Charles Manson and the murders perpetrated under his influence in California in 1969. The film was originally released as The Cult, re-released as The Manson Massacre in 1976, again in 1980 as House of Bondage.

*This version of The Cult has been edited for YouTube as per their content guidelines.
